title: Barter Golem
pitch: No currency, only matter: loot is polyomino pieces you bolt onto your golem's body grid, and the arrangement IS its stats.
howto: Drag material pieces onto the body grid: weight sets speed, balance sets dodge, adjacent materials spark synergies, and exposed pieces shatter off in battle, so bury the Heart. Win auto-battles to loot more pieces, expand the grid at bosses, and feed spares to the Forge Heart to level it.
controls: Drag pieces to the body to attach, tap a tray piece to rotate, tap a placed piece to remove. Drag pieces to the flame to feed the Heart. In battle, tap SURGE when charged.
